label: The Backroom Bunk
description: The Backroom Bunk forms a narrow sleeping chamber cut into the basalt mass behind The Glarewright Exchange’s matte-faced sales floor. Salt-cemented joints and sealed door gaskets carry the shop’s dust-control regimen into the room, while a recessed vent and trap grilles temper the mineral haze drawn from the terminator arcades. A low sleeping platform and wall-fastened locker occupy the longest wall, their surfaces finished in glare-killing dark coatings consistent with the Exchange’s optical work. A single hooded luminance lamp provides tightly controlled light, preserving the city’s strict standards against terminator flare.
